typeLine: Alchemist's Quicksilver Flask of the Cheetah
enchantMods: Reused at the end of this Flask's effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Chaos Golem that grants you damage over time and chaos resistance. The Chaos Golem can cast a damage over time Chaos aura and a cascade of Chaos spikes in addition to its melee attack.
explicitMods: Golems grant +16% to Damage over Time Multiplier
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, triggering linked spells. The brand will detach if the enemy dies.
explicitMods: Increases and Reductions to Cast Speed also apply to this Skill's Activation frequency
Can be Attached for a total Duration of 3.00 seconds
Can be Detached for a total Duration of 5.00 seconds
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Skills have 40% reduced Chaining range
Projectiles from Supported Skills have 4.8 metres maximum range
Supported Skills have 40% less Area of Effect
Supported Skills Deal 59% more Damage with Hits against Branded Enemy
Supported Skills are Triggered by Arcanist Brand, from the Brand's location
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that have no reservation. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Fire, Curse, Hex

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, lowering their fire resistance and giving them a chance to be ignited when hit.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies have -36% to Fire Resistance
Hits against Cursed Enemies have +25% chance to Ignite
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Strikes enemies in front of you with a surge of flame. Burning enemies are dealt more damage. If you hit an ignited enemy, will create burning ground under them. Your damage modifiers don't apply to this burning ground.
explicitMods: 110% more Damage with Hits against Burning enemies
Hits on Ignited Enemies create Burning Ground, no more than once every 2 seconds
Burning Ground deals 25% of Fire Damage per second of Ignite affecting Enemy
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Eyes of the Greatwolf
flavourText: I am but a vessel for a greater force.
It acts through me. Speaks through me.
Decides what lives and dies through me.
And will change the world through me.

name: Gloom Grip
implicitMods: Inflict Fire Exposure on Hit, applying -11% to Fire Resistance
Ignites you inflict spread to other Enemies within 1.2 metres

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Stone Golem. In addition to its melee attack, the Stone Golem uses a rolling charge and a powerful slam that can taunt enemies.
explicitMods: Minions have 40% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Stone Golem that takes a portion of the melee damage you recieve from enemy hits from its life before yours. In addition to its melee attack, the Stone Golem uses a rolling charge and a powerful slam that can taunt enemies.
explicitMods: Golems grant 15% of Melee Damage is taken from your Stone Golems' Life before you
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Flame Golem that grants you increased Damage and Area of Effect. The Flame Golem can cast a fire spray, a wave of fire damage, and an explosive arcing projectile.
explicitMods: Golems grant 20% increased Area of Effect
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Lightning Golem that grants you increased attack and cast speed, and mana regeneration. The Lightning Golem fires a projectile spell, creates orbs of Lightning that zap nearby enemies, and casts a temporary aura that grants added Lightning Damage to spells and attacks used by the Golem and its nearby allies.
explicitMods: Golems grant 10% increased Attack and Cast Speed
Golems grant 18 Mana Regenerated per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

enchantMods: Reused at the end of this Flask's effect
craftedMods: 50% Chance to Avoid being Stunned during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Headhunter
explicitMods: 24% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Victory Coat
implicitMods: 20% increased Effect of Buffs granted by your Golems

socketedItems.secDescrText: Once activated, continuously spends mana to cause volleys of ethereal weapons rain from the sky around you, dealing damage to enemies they impact. Each Blade will target a separate enemy in the volley area if possible. Each enemy can only be hit once by each volley, even if multiple blades land near them. This skill cannot be triggered or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
explicitMods: A Volley of blades falls every 0.7 seconds
2% increased Volley frequency per 100 maximum Mana
5 Blades fall per Volley, which will then Linger in the ground
Maximum 40 Lingering Blades can be left in the ground at a time
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies or inflicts ailments
explicitMods: 64% increased Duration of Ailments inflicted with Supported Skills
Supported Skills have 54% increased Effect of non-Damaging Ailments on Enemies
Supported Skills deal 19% more Damage with Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies, or can deal burning damage directly.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 10% increased Burning Damage

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Channels to build up a large explosion, which is released when you stop using the skill. The longer you channel, the larger the area of effect and damage of the explosion.
explicitMods: 165% more Spell Damage for each stage
60% more Damage with Ailments for each stage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: 200% more Spell Damage for each stage
110% more Damage with Ailments for each stage
hybrid.secDescrText: Targets an area and builds up stages in that area based on cast speed. It explodes every 3 stages, until it reaches a maximum of 15. As it gains more stages, the area gets smaller but the damage gets higher.

name: Obliteration
explicitMods: Gain 37% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Enemies you Kill have a 20% chance to Explode, dealing a quarter of their maximum Life as Chaos Damage
flavourText: We forge order from the world around us
Wielding anarchy and destruction as our tools of genesis.

name: Coruscating Elixir
enchantMods: Reused at the end of this Flask's effect
explicitMods: Chaos Damage taken does not bypass Energy Shield during effect

Removes all but one Life on use
Removed life is Regenerated as Energy Shield over 2 seconds
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Let blood sear in your veins,
Let the pain push outwards and turn away your enemy's blows.

name: Oriath's End
enchantMods: Reused at the end of this Flask's effect
explicitMods: Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 25% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

name: Foulborn Death Rush
explicitMods: Gain Adrenaline for 3 seconds on Kill
mutatedMods: 35% chance to gain an additional Vaal Soul on Kill
flavourText: To truly appreciate life you must be there when it ends

name: The Dark Monarch
explicitMods: +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems

Maximum number of Summoned Golems is Doubled
Cannot have Minions other than Summoned Golems
flavourText: "Hate? You speak to me of hate? You have no idea what your persecution inflicts.
How it chokes the heart. Withers the soul. Judge me, and you judge yourself."
- Saresh, last words, to Sekhema Orbala

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants elemental resistances and elemental ailment immunity to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain +39% to all Elemental Resistances
You and nearby allies are Immune to all Elemental Ailments

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that multiplies damage over time and increases skill effect duration of you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies deal 20% more Damage over Time
You and nearby allies have 19% increased Skill Effect Duration
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports aura skills that reserve life or mana to create auras around you.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 24% increased Aura effect

Supported Skills also count as Blessing Skills
You can only have one Aura on you from your Blessing Skills
Your Non-Blessing Skills which Reserve Mana are Disabled while you have an Aura from a Supported Skill on you

name: Rune Loop
explicitMods: Grants Level 20 Aspect of the Spider Skill
fracturedMods: Adds 11 to 22 Physical Damage to Attacks against you

name: Rise of the Phoenix
explicitMods: +25% to Fire Resistance while on Low Life
10% increased Movement Speed when on Low Life
100% chance to Avoid being Ignited while on Low Life
flavourText: My bearer shall be guarded by flame,
for I am the phoenix, forever radiant in glory.

name: Jiquani's Potential
implicitMods: +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitMods: +1 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems
1 to 56 Spell Lightning Damage per 10 Intelligence
flavourText: "I have risked everything. My position, my ambition, my
very life. There has to be a way to save our people. If we
must, let us tear apart the very foundations of reality!"

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff which can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

70% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take 2209 Damage

Consumes Frenzy Charges to increase duration.
